def burrows_wheeler_transform(s):
    """Burrows-Wheeler dĂ¶nĂĽĹźĂĽmĂĽnĂĽ uygular."""
    s += '$'  # DĂ¶nĂĽĹźĂĽmĂĽ benzersiz hale getirmek iĂ§in son karakter eklenir.
    rotations = [s[i:] + s[:i] for i in range(len(s))]
    rotations.sort()
    bwt = "".join(r[-1] for r in rotations)
    return bwt

def inverse_burrows_wheeler_transform(bwt):
    """Burrows-Wheeler dĂ¶nĂĽĹźĂĽmĂĽnĂĽ tersine Ă§evirir."""
    table = [""] * len(bwt)
    for _ in range(len(bwt)):
        table = sorted(bwt[i] + table[i] for i in range(len(bwt)))
    return table[0].rstrip('$')

if __name__ == '__main__':
    text = "banana"
    transformed_text = burrows_wheeler_transform(text)
    print(f"Orijinal Metin: {text}")
    print(f"BWT: {transformed_text}")

    original_text = inverse_burrows_wheeler_transform(transformed_text)
    print(f"Ters Ă‡evrilmiĹź Metin: {original_text}")
